surface_verification.justification: Backend-affects-Frontend: /reopen gained an optional column + client DnD/menu wiring. Ran client/e2e/flows/board-dnd-status-decouple.spec.ts (3 tests, incl. the new drag-Done->In-Progress-reopens) against an isolated single-process stack (built SPA via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR + tsx, temp HOME, :3947). 3/3 passed in a real Chromium.

behaviors.behavior: POST /reopen {column} reopens a done task into the dropped column (done->draft, boardColumn=target)
behaviors.evidence: server routes.reopen.test.ts 'reopens a done task INTO the dropped column' PASSED
server routes.reopen.test.ts 'rejects an invalid target column' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: POST /reopen with no column still defaults to Backlog (menu Re-open unchanged)
behaviors.evidence: server routes.reopen.test.ts 'omitted column still defaults to Backlog' + existing 'preserves every history field' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: POST /reopen on already-draft + divergent column applies boardColumn only (multi-tab race), state stays draft
behaviors.evidence: server routes.reopen.test.ts 'already-draft + a DIVERGENT explicit column' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: POST /reopen on already-draft + same column is an idempotent no-op
behaviors.evidence: server routes.reopen.test.ts 'already-draft + the SAME explicit column' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: useSetBoardColumn({reopen:true}) routes to reopenTask(taskId,column), not setBoardColumn
behaviors.evidence: client useExternalTasks.boardcolumn.test.ts 'reopen:true routes to reopenTask' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: useSetBoardColumn reopen optimistically flips state->draft AND boardColumn (no locked-done flash)
behaviors.evidence: client useExternalTasks.boardcolumn.test.ts 'reopen optimistically flips state->draft AND boardColumn' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: useSetBoardColumn with reopen falsy keeps the pure setBoardColumn path (rule-23 decoupling for live tasks)
behaviors.evidence: client useExternalTasks.boardcolumn.test.ts 'reopen falsy keeps the pure setBoardColumn path' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: End-to-end: dragging a Done card to In Progress reopens it (done->draft) + the card lands unlocked with an action CTA
behaviors.evidence: E2E board-dnd-status-decouple.spec.ts 'drag Done -> In Progress REOPENS + unlocks the card' PASSED (real Chromium, :3947)

behaviors.behavior: useReopenExternalTask (menu Re-open) forwards only taskId so RQ context is never sent as column (defaults Backlog)
behaviors.evidence: covered-by-existing-test: client tsc --noEmit (the arity collision broke the build) + existing reopen route 'defaults to Backlog' assertions

behaviors.behavior: Menu 'Move to...' of a Done card to a non-Done column reopens via the same path
behaviors.evidence: covered-by-existing-test: identical moveReopensTask + useSetBoardColumn path (unit-covered above); the live-card menu-move wiring is exercised by E2E 'accessible menu Move to...'
